title: Peppery Croatian Corn Arepa Quesadilla
description: A crumbly, crowd-pleasing croatian dish featuring corn arepa filled with mozzarella cheese, fried to perfection. A satvik-friendly twist on a classic quesadilla.
instructions: Heat a comal or griddle over medium-high heat.
Cook corn arepa for 2-3 minutes on each side, until lightly charred.
In a bowl, mix together mozzarella cheese, pepper, onion, and garlic.
Place a cooked corn arepa on a flat surface and spoon the cheese mixture onto half of the arepa.
Fold the other half of the arepa over the filling to create a half-circle shape.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the arepa and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until the cheese is melted and the arepa is crispy.
Remove the arepa from the skillet and let it cool for a minute or two.
Cut the arepa in half and serve immediately.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
